CustomField.description: Risk tier from the matched NEPA_Plaintiff_Profile__mdt record. Values mirror the CMT Risk_Tier__c picklist: LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, VERY_HIGH. Blank when nepa_plaintiff_risk_flag__c is false. Used by the Litigation Threat section visibility rule and by downstream risk scoring.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Risk tier assigned by Plaintiff Intelligence based on matched organization profile.
CustomField.label: Plaintiff Risk Tier
